answer:
Exley becomes suspicious of Smith when Smith asks him who "Rollo Tomasi" is, a name Exley had only shared in confidence with Vincennes before Smith killed him. This reveals that Smith was present when Vincennes died and heard the name, linking him to the murder. Exley then investigates and discovers that Meeks and Stensland had worked closely with Smith, confirming his corruption.

\boxed{\text{Smith asks Exley who "Rollo Tomasi" is, a name Exley only told Vincennes, revealing Smith's involvement in Vincennes' murder.}}
